zh.Touch-Fraser, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾圖
zh.lifeSummary: Beatrix Cheyne於大約1241年出生在蘇格蘭凱特內斯。她於1270年之前與Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser在蘇格蘭斯林史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年12月12日在蘇格蘭享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Touch-Fraser, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰斯林史爾圖
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Beatrix Cheyne于大约1241年出生在苏格兰凱特內斯。她于1270年之前与Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser在苏格兰斯林史爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年12月12日在苏格兰享年60岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: Beatrix Cheyne was born about 1241, in Caithness, Scotland. She married Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser before 1270, in Stirlingshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 12 December 1300, in Scotland, at the age of 60, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Beatrix Cheyne est née environ 1241, à Caithness, Écosse. Elle a épousé Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser avant 1270, à Stirlingshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 décembre 1300, à Écosse, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Beatrix Cheyne wurde um 1241 in Caithness, Scotland geboren. Sie hat vor 1270 in Stirlingshire, Scotland Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 12. Dezember 1300 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Beatrix Cheyne è nata il circa 1241 nel Caithness, Scotland. Lei sposato Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser prima del 1270, nel Stirlingshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 dicembre 1300, nel Scotland, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix Cheyneは約1241年にスコットランドケイスネスで生まれた。1270年以前にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアでSir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年12月12日にスコットランドで60歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix Cheyne(은)는 대략 1241년 스컷랜드 케이스네스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1270년 이전 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 12월 12일 스컷랜드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Touch-Fraser, Stirlingshire, Scotland: Touch, Striviling, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Beatrix Cheyne nasceu aproximadamente 1241, em Caithness, Scotland. Ela casou-se com Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser antes 1270, em Stirlingshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1300, em Scotland, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Beatrix Cheyne родилась около 1241 г. в местности цеитнесс, Шотландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser перед 1270 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 12 декабря 1300 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Beatrix Cheyne nació aproximadamente 1241, en Caithness, Scotland. Se casó con Sir Andrew Fraser of Touchfraser antes de 1270, en Stirlingshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de diciembre de 1300, en Scotland, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
